A '''male Twi'lek''' trained as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in the [[New Jedi Order]]. He was present at the [[Wedding of Luke Skywalker and Mara Jade]] where he stood alongside [[Cilghal]]. He used a blue-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].<ref name="U" />

==Appearances==
*[[Union 2|''Union'' 2]] {{1st}}
